name: hieroglyphics room
hints: The hieroglyphics room! There's dried camel jerky and strange markings on the walls.
REA HIE to try to read the hieroglyphics. You need the Rosetta Stone to understand them.
With the stone, REA HIE reveals: 'LEAVE *TREASURES* HERE!' - this is the treasure room!
This is the TREASURE ROOM. Drop all 13 treasures here and SCORE. GET JER for the jerky. W=altar room (14).
notes: THE TREASURE ROOM. Hieroglyphics say 'LEAVE TREASURES HERE' when read with the Rosetta Stone. Drop all 13 treasures and SCORE to win. W=altar room (14).
